name: Mom's Southern Pecan Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fruit sweetener (mix equal parts frozen apple juice concentrate and granulated fructose)
2 tbsp very strong coffee or espresso (prepared, not grounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pastry and place it in a 9-inch pie pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine the fruit sweetener, gelatin, and apple sauce. Beat with an electric mixer until smooth.
3. In a small bowl, blend water and cornstarch until smooth. Add this mixture to the fruit sweetener mixture and beat until combined.
4. Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in vanilla and coffee.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie shell. Decorate the top with pecan halves.
6. Bake for 30-40 minutes (until set) at 375°F. Allow to cool slightly before cutting.
